meta.title: Scheme Weaver Components Overview
meta.description: Overview of the components within Scheme Weaver, an AI diagramming pipeline including a FastAPI server, core library, SVGKit library, Rust CLI, ARQ worker, and planned Nuxt web editor.
meta.author: schemeweaver

nodes.label: FastAPI Server (v1/generate & v1/update)
nodes.description: A RESTful API server exposing endpoints for diagram generation and updates.

nodes.label: Core Library - Pipeline Class
nodes.description: Sends prompts to LLM providers and converts responses into DIR JSON.

nodes.label: Core Library - Renderer
nodes.description: Converts DIR JSON into an SVG using BFS topological layout engine.

nodes.label: Pluggable LLM Providers
nodes.description: Providers for Anthropic Claude, OpenAI, and Ollama.

nodes.label: SVGKit Library
nodes.description: Validates ARIA labels and semantic node IDs in SVG output post-processing stage.

nodes.label: Rust CLI
nodes.description: A thin HTTP client over FastAPI server with generate and update subcommands as a single binary.

nodes.label: ARQ Async Worker (Redis-backed Job Queue)
nodes.description: Provides asynchronous diagram generation via decoupling of long-running LLM calls from HTTP requests.

nodes.label: Nuxt 4 Web Editor (planned)
nodes.description: A planned web-based editor using Nuxt.js Framework for diagram creation and management.

edges.label: Diagram requests from API server to core pipeline
LLM response feeding into DIR JSON creation
DIR JSON to renderer for SVG creation
SVG validation and node ID enforcement by SVGKit
CLI requests to the FastAPI server endpoints
Async requests managed by ARQ worker feeding into renderer via Redis job queue
